name: @acs/grading-contract
description: Stable contract (TypeScript types + client) for the grading service /grade endpoint — the boundary between the product (apps/web) and grading (services/grading-api) work streams.

scripts.generate: json-schema-to-typescript schema/grade-response.schema.json -o src/types.generated.ts || echo 'optional: npm i -D json-schema-to-typescript to regenerate, then diff vs src/types.ts'
